I am designing a human evaluation questionnaire to compare LLM generated responses towards factual questions. One method is direct generation from LLMs, the other is augmented with retrieval. I hope the retrieval helps to increase the factuality of the generations. But during the human evaluation, I do not want the subjects to verify the correctness of the generation, but just get a feeling of how helpful the generations are. What are some dimensions that I can ask the humans to evaluation on for the generations from two different methods?
